summary: PR 2606 split the first two crowdsfx functions into a new `src/melee/sfx/sfx_unk.c`, adjusted GALE01 split and symbol ownership around `0x80321900..0x803219AC` and nearby `.sdata2`, marked both SFX objects Matching in `configure.py`, and replaced a raw `char*`/offset access to `mpLib_80458868` with a typed `mpCollisionBox` declaration shared through mp headers.

key_files.role: New split source file containing `un_80321900` and `un_80321950`, moved from `crowdsfx.c`.
Original crowdsfx source narrowed to start at `fn_803219AC`; globals made non-static and typed access added for `mpLib_80458868`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `char* mpLib` plus `*(f32*)(mpLib + 0x14)` replaced by `mpCollisionBox* box` and `box[1].bottom`

key_files.role: Header exposes crowdsfx functions and globals needed after the split.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: crowdsfx.h adds externs for un_804A2F08 and un_804D7050

key_files.role: Split metadata assigns `melee/sfx/sfx_unk.c` text and `.sdata2` ranges and moves `crowdsfx.c` text start to `0x803219AC`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: splits.txt adds melee/sfx/sfx_unk.c and updates crowdsfx.c ranges

key_files.role: Nearby `.sdata2` float/double symbols changed from global `un_` names to local labels.
Build configuration changes SFX objects from one NonMatching crowdsfx object to Matching `sfx_unk.c` and Matching `crowdsfx.c`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py replaces Object(NonMatching, "melee/sfx/crowdsfx.c") with two Matching objects
raw_diff: mplib.h include change and extern declaration

key_files.role: Removes the old anonymous static struct definition for `mpLib_80458868`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mplib.static.h deletes static anonymous struct array

key_files.role: Adds forward declaration for `mpCollisionBox` and reorders existing mp forward declarations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: forward.h adds `typedef struct mpCollisionBox mpCollisionBox;`

what_changed: Added a new split unit `melee/sfx/sfx_unk.c` covering text `0x80321900..0x803219AC` and `.sdata2` `0x804DE148..0x804DE14C`.
Updated `crowdsfx.c` split start from `0x80321900` to `0x803219AC` and `.sdata2` start from `0x804DE148` to `0x804DE150`.
Changed `configure.py` so `melee/sfx/sfx_unk.c` and `melee/sfx/crowdsfx.c` are both listed as Matching objects.
Changed `.sdata2` symbols at `0x804DE148`, `0x804DE150`, and `0x804DE158` from global `un_` symbols to local labels.
Introduced `mpCollisionBox` and used it for `mpLib_80458868[2]` instead of a raw `char[]` extern and pointer arithmetic.
Exposed `un_804A2F08`, `gCrowdConfig`, and `un_804D7050` through `crowdsfx.h` to support the split file.
smart_moves: The split moves whole functions (`un_80321900`, `un_80321950`) into a new TU and updates split ranges in the same PR, keeping source and split metadata aligned.
The PR replaces `*(f32*) (mpLib + 0x14)` with `box[1].bottom` after introducing a real `mpCollisionBox` type, improving reviewability and reducing raw offset use.
The PR moves `mpLib_80458868` from an anonymous static header-local struct to a named type and extern declaration, making cross-TU use explicit.
The symbol changes make nearby `.sdata2` constants local labels, consistent with the split range changes shown in `splits.txt`.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When splitting a matched source file, update split ranges, configure object status, and any header-visible globals/functions needed by the new TU in the same focused change.
If a data object is shared across TUs, a named struct plus owning extern can replace a header-local anonymous static definition and raw address-style access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mplib.static.h deletes anonymous static mpLib_80458868

naming_conventions.convention: `mpCollisionBox` names a small collision-boundary struct with fields ordered `top`, `bottom`, `left`, `right`.
Unknown SFX functions and globals retained address-style names such as `un_80321900`, `un_80321950`, `un_804A2F08`, and `un_804D7050` rather than inventing semantic names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Split the object boundary at `0x803219AC`, leaving `fn_803219AC` as the first function in `crowdsfx.c` and moving earlier functions to `sfx_unk.c`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: crowdsfx.c and sfx_unk.c function movement

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use symbol metadata changes to convert split-local `.sdata2` constants from global `un_` symbols to local labels after assigning ownership to the new split.
Replace raw pointer arithmetic against `mpLib_80458868` with typed array indexing to express the same offset as `box[1].bottom`.

follow_up_queries: Search for other raw uses of `mpLib_80458868` or `char* mpLib` that can use `mpCollisionBox`.
Search for references to `.sdata2` symbols `un_804DE148`, `un_804DE150`, and `un_804DE158` in older PRs or source notes.
Check whether other SFX split candidates use functions immediately before `fn_803219AC` or similar unknown `sfx_unk` naming.
Search for anonymous static structs in `.static.h` files that are actually shared global data and may need named types.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Split source and metadata together
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2606 shows a focused split where the new source file, split ranges, configure object entries, symbol ownership, and header-visible declarations were updated together for `crowdsfx`/`sfx_unk`.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer typed shared data over raw offset access
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2606 replaced `char*` access to `mpLib_80458868` and a manual `+0x14` float load with a named `mpCollisionBox` array and `box[1].bottom` field access.

source_update_candidates.title: crowdsfx split boundary after PR 2606
source_update_candidates.text: `melee/sfx/sfx_unk.c` owns text `0x80321900..0x803219AC` and `.sdata2` `0x804DE148..0x804DE14C`; `melee/sfx/crowdsfx.c` starts at text `0x803219AC` and `.sdata2` `0x804DE150` in this PR's split metadata.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path/split fact, but should be curated against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: mpLib_80458868 typed as mpCollisionBox array
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2606 defines `mpLib_80458868` as `mpCollisionBox mpLib_80458868[2]` and declares it in `src/melee/mp/mplib.h`; `mpCollisionBox` has `top`, `bottom`, `left`, and `right` float fields.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential reusable path/type fact for future raw-offset cleanup; verify against current source before accepting.

source_update_candidates.title: Shared split data should get a named type and owning extern
source_update_candidates.text: When a split makes a previously local data object visible across TUs, consider moving from anonymous static/header-local storage to a named struct and a single owning extern declaration rather than using raw `char[]` externs and pointer arithmetic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mplib.static.h deletes anonymous static definition
source_update_candidates.reason: This overlaps existing typed-field and truthful-header standards; curator should decide whether it merits an explicit split-data note.
